jobs.title: Shore Excursions Product Development Manager
jobs.description:
Your Purpose

In line with current and future tourism trends, the Shore Excursions Product Development Manager oversees product content and delivery, negotiates costs, and develops new tours to grow revenue and enhance guest satisfaction in specific geographical regions.

Your Impact

- Lead the development of innovative shore excursion products and manage the tour program for assigned regions.

- Source and procure high-quality excursions in line with seasonal demand and company standards.

- Monitor market trends, guest preferences, and potential risks to develop effective action and improvement plans.

- Analyze guest feedback and satisfaction scores to drive continuous product and service enhancements.

- Build and maintain relationships with up to 100 tour operators, overseeing a portfolio of 1,000+ tours.

- Negotiate contracts with suppliers, manage large-scale bids, and optimize costs to ensure profitability and efficiency.

- Collaborate cross-functionally with Legal, Insurance, and Operations teams to ensure compliance and risk mitigation.

- Oversee product creation, feedback analysis, and product revamping to maintain competitive and engaging offerings.

- Ensure inventory accuracy and perform regular site inspections within assigned destinations.

- Represent the company at government meetings, industry events, and travel conventions to strengthen partnerships and brand presence.

Your Journey so far

- 10 years of experience in the Shore Excursions Department within the cruise industry (either onboard or ashore) is preferred. Experience in shore excursion operations within the hospitality industry or with a global tour operator may also be considered.

- 5–10+ years of proven experience in global shore excursion operations is required, including product development, bid management, and cross-functional collaboration with legal, insurance, and operations stakeholders.

- A bachelor’s degree in tourism and proficiency in multiple languages are highly preferred.

Your Essentials

- Flexibility and strong analytical skills.

- Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.

- IT-savvy; experience with Fidelio is highly advantageous.

- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office applications (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Publisher).

- Extensive knowledge of shore excursion products and operational delivery.

- Fluent in English with a good command of Italian; additional languages are an asset.

- Willingness to travel up to 25% of the time.

- Must hold an EU passport or have the legal right to work in Switzerland.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

jobs.title: F&B Service Manager
jobs.description:
Your Purpose

The F&B Service Manager is a strategic headquarters-based role responsible for providing leadership, oversight, and guidance for all Food & Beverage service operations across the fleet. This role ensures service excellence, consistency in guest experience, and alignment with corporate standards. Acting as the primary liaison between shipboard teams and corporate leadership, the Manager of F&B Service drives quality, innovation, compliance, and talent development across all F&B operations. This role reports directly to the Vice President of F&B.

Your Impact

Strategic Operations & Standards

- Define, implement, and maintain fleet-wide F&B service standards and best practices.

- Develop and oversee strategic initiatives to enhance guest experience and operational efficiency across all vessels.

- Coordinate with shipboard teams to ensure compliance with corporate policies, procedures, and brand standards.

- Conduct remote audits, operational reviews, and assessments to maintain service excellence.

Guest Experience & Quality Assurance

- Monitor guest satisfaction and F&B performance metrics, analyze trends, and recommend improvements.

- Collaborate with culinary and beverage teams to innovate and elevate the onboard F&B offering.

- Ensure alignment with global health, safety, and hygiene protocols through corporate-led programs.

Training & Leadership Development

- Design and oversee training programs for F&B teams to ensure consistency with the brand’s service philosophy.

- Mentor and develop shipboard F&B leaders to support career progression and succession planning.

Human Resources & Leadership Oversight

- Collaborate with HR on performance reviews, promotions, rotations, and career pathing for F&B personnel.

- Promote a high-performance culture rooted in recognition, development, and fairness.

Fleet Support & Headquarters Coordination

- Serve as the principal corporate liaison for all F&B service matters across the fleet.

- Coordinate F&B equipment planning, material sourcing, and integration of brand standards.

- Compile and analyze operational reports, voyage summaries, and performance metrics for corporate leadership.

- Participate in key shipboard meetings remotely or in person as required.

Financial Oversight

- Support financial sustainability and profitability of F&B operations across the fleet.

- Implement continuous improvement programs to achieve operational and financial targets.

- Oversee cost control, inventory planning, and resource allocation in coordination with shipboard teams.

Your Journey so far

- Minimum 15 years in high-end Food & Beverage operations.

- At least 5 years in senior leadership roles within luxury hospitality or cruise operations.

- Proven experience in multi-site operational oversight.

Your Essentials

Leadership & Communication

- Strategic, dynamic leader with experience managing multicultural teams.

- Excellent communication skills, fluent in English; additional languages an asset.

Technical & Operational Knowledge

- Proficient in Microsoft Office and industry-specific systems.

- Strong understanding of HR protocols, labor regulations, and compliance standards.

- Expert knowledge of F&B operations, beverage programming, and luxury hospitality standards.

Professional Competencies

- Strategic thinker with operational agility and strong business acumen.

- Results-driven, detail-oriented, and highly collaborative.

- Capable of working cross-functionally across corporate and shipboard teams.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

jobs.title: Destinations Experience Manager
jobs.description:
Where passion meets opportunity

Discover your journey into the extraordinary.

Your Purpose

The Destination Experience Manager is fully responsible for the performance, development, and operational excellence of assigned regions.
This role requires strong cruise shore excursion experience, deep knowledge of ports and destination logistics, and a solid understanding of onboard operations. The Manager oversees the full lifecycle of destination experiences — from sourcing and contracting to onboard delivery and financial performance.

Your Impact

Destination & Product Management
•    Develop and manage destination experiences across assigned regions
•    Scout and contract TOs/DMCs through structured bidding and negotiation
•    Ensure experiences are operationally feasible and aligned with luxury brand standards
•    Manage pricing, ROI, and capacity planning
•    Oversee content coordination with Marketing and system loading (Seaware, Otalio, etc.)

Onboard & Operational Support
•    Ensure products reflect onboard realities (timings, guest demographics, mobility considerations)
•    Train and support onboard Destination teams
•    Assist with escalations, refunds, and service recovery when required
•    Monitor guest feedback and implement corrective actions

Financial & Performance Management
•    Own budgeting and revenue performance for assigned regions
•    Monitor margins, refund trends, and voyage-level contribution
•    Identify underperforming ports and optimize offerings accordingly
•    Partner with Finance and Analytics on reporting and dashboards

 

Your Journey so far

- 7–10+ years in cruise shore excursions, destination management, or luxury travel

- Bachelor’s degree in Hospitality, Tourism, Business, or equivalent experience preferred.

Your Essentials

- Strong onboard cruise experience and operational understanding

- Deep knowledge of ports and destination infrastructure

- Knowledge of Alaska, Caribbean, South America, or Asia regions is a strong advantage

- Proven negotiation and financial management skills

- Strong analytical and communication abilities

- Fluent in English; additional languages are an asset

- Valid Swiss work permit or eligibility to work in Switzerland / US permit for Miami position 

At Explora Journeys, we are redefining luxury ocean travel — where discovery, well-being, and a deep respect for the seas come together in harmony. 
We seek passionate professionals who share our vision of a more immersive, transformative way to discover the world’s most inspiring destinations by sea.
Are you ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at Explora Journeys, where an ocean of opportunities awaits. Your journey to the Ocean State of Mind starts here.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Dove la passione incontra l'opportunità

Scopri il tuo viaggio nello straordinario.

Il tuo scopo

Il Destination Experience Manager è pienamente responsabile per le prestazioni, lo sviluppo e l'eccellenza operativa delle regioni assegnate.
Questo ruolo richiede una forte esperienza di crociera sulle coste, una profonda conoscenza dei porti e della logistica di destinazione, e una solida comprensione delle operazioni a bordo. Il Manager sovrintende al ciclo di vita completo delle esperienze di destinazione, dal sourcing e dal contrarsi alla consegna a bordo e alle prestazioni finanziarie.

Il tuo impatto

Destinazione e gestione dei prodotti
• Sviluppare e gestire le esperienze di destinazione nelle regioni assegnate
• Scout e contrarre TOs/DMC attraverso offerte strutturate e trattative
• Assicurarsi che le esperienze siano fattibili e allineate agli standard del marchio di lusso
• Gestione dei prezzi, ROI e pianificazione delle capacità
• Superare il coordinamento dei contenuti con il Marketing e il caricamento del sistema (Seaware, Otalio, ecc.)

Supporto operativo onboard &
• Assicurare che i prodotti riflettano le realtà a bordo (timing, demografie degli ospiti, considerazioni sulla mobilità)
• Treno e supporto a bordo
• Assistere con escalation, rimborsi e recupero dei servizi quando necessario
• Monitorare il feedback degli ospiti e implementare azioni correttive

Gestione finanziaria e delle prestazioni
• Prestito bilancio e rendimento delle entrate per le regioni assegnate
• Monitorare i margini, le tendenze del rimborso e il contributo a livello di viaggio
• Identificare le porte sottoperformanti e ottimizzare le offerte di conseguenza
• Partner con Finance e Analytics per report e dashboard

Il tuo viaggio finora

- 7–10+ anni di escursioni in crociera lungo la costa, gestione della destinazione o viaggio di lusso

- Corso di laurea in Ospitalità, Turismo, Business o esperienza equivalente preferito.

I tuoi essenziali

- Forte esperienza di crociera a bordo e comprensione operativa

- Conoscenza profonda dei porti e delle infrastrutture di destinazione

- La conoscenza delle regioni dell'Alaska, dei Caraibi, del Sud America o dell'Asia è un forte vantaggio

- Prove capacità di negoziazione e gestione finanziaria

- Forte capacità analitiche e di comunicazione

- Fluente in inglese; lingue aggiuntive sono un bene

- Valido permesso di lavoro svizzero o idoneità al lavoro in Svizzera / permesso USA per la posizione di Miami

A Explora Journeys, stiamo ridefinindo il viaggio oceanico di lusso - dove la scoperta, il benessere, e un profondo rispetto per i mari si uniscono in armonia.
Cerchiamo professionisti appassionati che condividono la nostra visione di un modo più coinvolgente e trasformativo per scoprire le destinazioni più ispiranti del mondo dal mare.
Sei pronto a trasformare la tua passione in qualcosa di straordinario? Unisciti a noi a Explora Journeys, dove un oceano di opportunità attende. Il vostro viaggio verso lo Stato della Mente Oceano inizia qui.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Wo Leidenschaft die Gelegenheit trifft

Entdecken Sie Ihre Reise ins Außergewöhnliche.

Ihr Ziel

Der Destination Experience Manager ist voll verantwortlich für die Leistung, Entwicklung und operative Exzellenz der zugewiesenen Regionen.
Diese Rolle erfordert ein starkes Kreuzfahrt-Strand-Exkursions-Erlebnis, tiefes Wissen von Häfen und Ziel-Logistik, und ein solides Verständnis von Onboard-Operationen. Der Manager überwacht den gesamten Lebenszyklus von Zielerlebnissen – von der Beschaffung und dem Auftrag bis zur Bordauslieferung und Finanzleistung.

Ihre Auswirkungen

Ziel und Produktmanagement
• Entwicklung und Verwaltung von Zielerlebnissen in bestimmten Regionen
• Scout und Vertrag TOs/DMCs durch strukturierte Gebote und Verhandlungen
• Erfahrungsaustausch ist betriebsbereit und mit Luxusmarkenstandards ausgerichtet
• Preisgestaltung, ROI und Kapazitätsplanung verwalten
• Übersehen Sie die inhaltliche Koordination mit Marketing und Systembelastung (Seaware, Otalio, etc.)

Onboard & operative Unterstützung
• Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Produkte über Bord der Realitäten (Stimmen, Gastdemografie, Mobilitätsbedenken) reflektieren
• Trainieren und Support an Bord von Destination Teams
• Bei Bedarf mit Eskalationen, Rückerstattungen und Service-Recovery
• Überwachen Sie das Gästefeedback und implementieren Sie Korrekturmaßnahmen

Finanz- und Leistungsmanagement
• Eigene Budgetierung und Umsatzleistung für zugewiesene Regionen
• Überwachen Sie Margen, Erstattungstrends und Reise-Level-Beitrag
• Untertransformierende Ports identifizieren und Angebote entsprechend optimieren
• Partner mit Finanzen und Analytics über Reporting und Dashboards

Ihre Reise so weit

- 7–10+ Jahre in Kreuzfahrt-Strand Exkursionen, Ziel-Management oder Luxusreisen

- Bachelor-Abschluss in Hospitality, Tourismus, Business oder gleichwertige Erfahrung bevorzugt.

Ihre Essenzen

- Starke Bordfahrt Erfahrung und operatives Verständnis

- Tiefe Kenntnisse der Häfen und der Zielinfrastruktur

- Die Kenntnis der Regionen Alaska, Karibik, Südamerika oder Asiens ist ein starker Vorteil

- Bewährte Verhandlungs- und Finanzmanagementfähigkeiten

- Starke analytische und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten

- fließend in Englisch; zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Vermögen

- Gültige Schweizer Arbeitserlaubnis oder Anspruch auf Arbeit in der Schweiz / US-Bewilligung für Miami Position

Bei Explora Journeys erneuern wir Luxus-Seereise – wo Entdeckung, Wohlbefinden und ein tiefer Respekt für die Meere in Harmonie zusammenkommen.
Wir suchen leidenschaftliche Fachleute, die unsere Vision einer immersiven, transformativen Art teilen, um die inspirierendsten Ziele der Welt auf dem Meer zu entdecken.
Sind Sie bereit, Ihre Leidenschaft in etwas Außergewöhnliches zu verwandeln? Begleiten Sie uns bei Explora Journeys, wo ein Ozean der Möglichkeiten erwartet. Hier beginnt Ihre Reise in den Ocean State of Mind.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Où la passion rencontre des opportunités

Découvrez votre voyage dans l'extraordinaire.

Votre but

Le gestionnaire de l'expérience de destination est entièrement responsable du rendement, du développement et de l'excellence opérationnelle des régions désignées.
Ce rôle exige une solide expérience d'excursion à terre de croisière, une connaissance approfondie des ports et de la logistique de destination, et une bonne compréhension des opérations à bord. Le gestionnaire supervise l'ensemble du cycle de vie des expériences de destination, de l'approvisionnement et de la passation de marchés à la prestation à bord et au rendement financier.

Votre impact

Gestion de la destination et des produits
• Développer et gérer les expériences de destination dans les régions désignées
• Scout et contrat des TO/DMC par des appels d'offres et des négociations structurés
• Veiller à ce que les expériences soient opérationnelles et conformes aux normes de la marque de luxe
• Gérer les prix, le ROI et la planification des capacités
• Surveiller la coordination du contenu avec le marketing et le chargement du système (Seaware, Otalio, etc.)

Soutien embarqué et opérationnel
• Veiller à ce que les produits reflètent les réalités de bord (timings, démographie des clients, mobilité)
• Train et assistance à bord des équipes de destination
• Aider aux escalades, aux remboursements et à la récupération des services au besoin
• Surveiller la rétroaction des clients et mettre en œuvre des mesures correctives

Gestion financière et du rendement
• Résultats budgétaires et recettes propres pour les régions affectées
• Surveiller les marges, les tendances des remboursements et la contribution au niveau du voyage
• Identifier les ports sous-performants et optimiser les offres en conséquence
• Partenaire avec Finance et Analytics sur les rapports et les tableaux de bord

Votre voyage jusqu'à présent

- 7-10 ans et plus en croisières, gestion de destination ou voyages de luxe

- Baccalauréat en hôtellerie, tourisme, affaires ou expérience équivalente préféré.

Vos essentiels

- Forte expérience de croisière à bord et compréhension opérationnelle

- Connaissance approfondie des ports et des infrastructures de destination

- La connaissance des régions de l'Alaska, des Caraïbes, de l'Amérique du Sud ou de l'Asie est un fort avantage

- Compétences éprouvées en négociation et en gestion financière

- Fortes capacités d'analyse et de communication

- Fluent en anglais; les langues supplémentaires sont un atout

- Permis de travail suisse valide ou éligibilité pour travailler en Suisse / permis américain pour le poste de Miami

À Explora Journeys, nous redéfinissons le voyage maritime de luxe, où la découverte, le bien-être et le profond respect des mers s'unissent en harmonie.
Nous recherchons des professionnels passionnés qui partagent notre vision d'une façon plus immersive et transformatrice de découvrir les destinations les plus inspirantes du monde par la mer.
Êtes-vous prêt à transformer votre passion en quelque chose d'extraordinaire ? Rejoignez-nous à Explora Journeys, où un océan d'opportunités vous attend. Votre voyage vers l'état de l'océan commence ici.

jobs.title: Brand Manager - Brand & Product

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile del marchio - Marchio e prodotto

jobs.description:
Where passion meets opportunity

Discover your journey into the extraordinary.

Your Purpose

Discover your journey into the extraordinary.

Explora Journeys is a vibrant, cosmopolitan, European luxury brand, imagined in the heart of Swiss hospitality in Geneva. Leveraging our parent company MSC Group’s hundreds of years of maritime expertise, our fleet of six luxury ships (four currently in the pipeline) are being built and designed in a totally different and unique way that will transform and redefine the cruise experience, creating a category of its own, appealing to the next generation of luxury travellers. 

Part of the global Marketing team and reporting directly to the Brand Director, this role plays a central role in safeguarding, shaping and activating the Explora Journeys brand across all touchpoints, with a particular focus on brand campaigns, the fleet and new brand developments.

Based at our headquarters in Geneva, this role sits at the intersection of brand strategy, product storytelling, and execution, working closely with Product, Design, Hotel Operations, Commercial, PR, Media, and Digital teams to bring the brand to life with clarity, consistency and emotional depth, across markets.

 

Your Impact

Brand Management & Governance

- Act as a core guardian of the Explora Journeys brand, supporting the Brand Director in the day to day management, development, and evolution of the brand.

- Ensure consistent application of brand identity, tone of voice, messaging, and visual language across all touchpoints, channels, and guest journeys.

- Lead the development, evolution and maintenance of brand guidelines, frameworks, and master toolkits, ensuring relevance, clarity, and scalability globally.

- Monitor brand execution across markets and partners, proactively identifying inconsistencies and working collaboratively with stakeholders to safeguard luxury and hospitality standards.

- Contribute to brand strategy initiatives, brand evolution projects, and internal brand education, strengthening brand understanding and alignment across the organisation.

Campaigns, Content & Brand Activation

- Lead the development and delivery of master brand and product campaigns, in line with brand strategy and commercial priorities.

- Oversee the creation of hero brand and product assets, including key visuals, copy frameworks, brochures, photography, and videography.

- Work closely with Media, Digital, and PR teams to ensure a coherent  and premium brand expression across paid, owned, and earned channels.

- Manage and curate brand, product and fleet content within DAM and PIM systems, ensuring accuracy, ease of use and global market adoption.

Product Marketing – Fleet & Onboard Experience

- Own and articulate the brand and product narrative for the Explora Journeys fleet, translating ship design, onboard experiences and service philosophy into compelling, clear, and guest-centric storytelling.

- Act as a key brand partner to Product, New Builds and Hotel Operations teams, supporting projects throughout the ship lifecycle; from early concept through delivery, launch and in-service evolution.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Dove la passione incontra l'opportunità

Scopri il tuo viaggio nello straordinario.

Il tuo scopo

Scopri il tuo viaggio nello straordinario.

Explora Journeys è un marchio di lusso europeo vibrante, cosmopolita, immaginato nel cuore dell'ospitalità svizzera a Ginevra. Sfruttando le centinaia di anni di esperienza marittima della nostra società madre MSC Group, la nostra flotta di sei navi di lusso (quattro attualmente in cantiere) sono state costruite e progettate in modo totalmente diverso e unico che trasformeranno e ridefiniranno l'esperienza di crociera, creando una categoria propria, attraendo la prossima generazione di viaggiatori di lusso.

Parte del team di Marketing globale e riportando direttamente al Brand Director, questo ruolo svolge un ruolo centrale nella salvaguardia, nella modellazione e nell'attivazione del marchio Explora Journeys in tutti i punti di contatto, con una particolare attenzione alle campagne di marca, alla flotta e ai nuovi sviluppi del marchio.

Situato nella nostra sede di Ginevra, questo ruolo si trova all'intersezione della strategia di marca, della narrazione dei prodotti e dell'esecuzione, lavorando a stretto contatto con i team di Product, Design, Hotel Operations, Commercial, PR, Media e Digital per portare il marchio alla vita con chiarezza, consistenza e profondità emotiva, attraverso i mercati.

Il tuo impatto

Gestione e Governance dei marchi

- Agire come tutore principale del marchio Explora Journeys, supportando il Brand Director nella gestione quotidiana, nello sviluppo e nell'evoluzione del marchio.

- Assicurare l'applicazione coerente di identità di marca, tono di voce, messaggistica e linguaggio visivo in tutti i punti di contatto, canali e viaggi degli ospiti.

- Condurre lo sviluppo, l'evoluzione e la manutenzione delle linee guida, dei framework e dei toolkit master, garantendo rilevanza, chiarezza e scalabilità a livello globale.

- Monitorare l'esecuzione del marchio su mercati e partner, identificare proattivamente le incongruenze e lavorare in collaborazione con gli stakeholder per salvaguardare gli standard di lusso e ospitalità.

- Contribuire a iniziative di strategia di marca, progetti di evoluzione del marchio e formazione interna del marchio, rafforzare la comprensione e l'allineamento del marchio in tutta l'organizzazione.

Campagne, contenuti e attività di marca

- Condurre lo sviluppo e la consegna di campagne di master brand e prodotti, in linea con la strategia del marchio e le priorità commerciali.

- Superare la creazione di eroi e beni di prodotto, tra cui visivi chiave, quadri di copia, brochure, fotografia e videografia.

- Lavorare a stretto contatto con i team Media, Digital e PR per garantire un'espressione coerente e premium del marchio attraverso canali pagati, di proprietà e guadagnati.

- Gestire e curare i contenuti di marca, prodotto e flotta all'interno dei sistemi DAM e PIM, garantendo precisione, facilità d'uso e adozione di mercato globale.

Marketing del prodotto – Fleet & Onboard Experience

- Possedere e articolare la narrazione del marchio e del prodotto per la flotta Explora Journeys, traducendo il design delle navi, le esperienze a bordo e la filosofia di servizio in avvincente, chiaro, e guest-centric storytelling.

- Agire come partner chiave del marchio per i team di Product, New Builds e Hotel Operations, supportando progetti in tutto il ciclo di vita della nave; dal concetto iniziale alla consegna, al lancio e all'evoluzione in-service.

- Definire e attivare proposizioni e concetti a livello di nave, esperienze a bordo, concetti suite, pilastri culinari, benessere e vendita al dettaglio, e rituali di servizio.

- Assicurare l'allineamento tra l'esperienza ospite a bordo e la promessa del marchio comunicata al mercato.

Launch & Go to Market Coordination

- Supporto del marchio e prontezza del prodotto per nuove iniziative di marca, campagne, lanci delle navi, grandi pietre miliari e innovazioni a bordo.

- Sviluppare strumenti di lancio master per dotare canali, mercati, vendite e PR con chiare narrazioni, posizionamento e attività.

- Assicurare coerenza, chiarezza e allineamento del marchio in tutte le comunicazioni interne ed esterne relative a marca, flotta ed evoluzione del prodotto.

Collaborazione funzionale e eccellenza operativa

- Agire come partner di marca di fiducia attraverso le funzioni, promuovendo l'allineamento tra brand, prodotto, commerciale e team operativi

- Coordinare budget, fornitori, previsioni, ordini di acquisto e fatturazione relative alle iniziative di marca.

- Equilibrare il marchio strategico pensando con le mani sull'esecuzione in un ambiente veloce.

Il tuo viaggio finora

- Laurea magistrale in Marketing, Brand Management, Product Marketing, o in un campo relativo.

- 8+ anni di esperienza nella gestione del marchio e nella costruzione di campagne.

- Esperienza prioritaria all'interno di lusso, premium o high-end di viaggio, ospitalità o marchi di consumatori fortemente preferito.

- Esperienza comprovata che opera in un ambiente di quartier generale globale, gestione dei quadri di marca e dei beni master in tutti i mercati.

- Esperienza di agenzie di gestione e partner creativi esterni.

I tuoi essenziali

- Esposizione al marketing del prodotto e ai prodotti basati sull'esperienza fisica (ship, hotel, resort o ambienti premium complessi altamente desiderabili).

- Forte sensibilità creativa combinata con rigore operativo, attenzione ai dettagli e capacità di gestione degli stakeholder.

- Comodo spostamento tra pensiero strategico del marchio e esecuzione dettagliata.

- Fluente in inglese; lingue europee aggiuntive sono un forte vantaggio.

A Explora Journeys, stiamo ridefinindo il viaggio oceanico di lusso - dove la scoperta, il benessere, e un profondo rispetto per i mari si uniscono in armonia.
Cerchiamo professionisti appassionati che condividono la nostra visione di un modo più coinvolgente e trasformativo per scoprire le destinazioni più ispiranti del mondo dal mare.
Sei pronto a trasformare la tua passione in qualcosa di straordinario? Unisciti a noi a Explora Journeys, dove un oceano di opportunità attende. Il vostro viaggio verso lo Stato della Mente Oceano inizia qui.

Entdecken Sie Ihre Reise ins Außergewöhnliche.

Ihr Ziel

Entdecken Sie Ihre Reise ins Außergewöhnliche.

Explora Journeys ist eine lebendige, kosmopolitische, europäische Luxusmarke, die sich im Herzen der Schweizer Gastfreundschaft in Genf vorstellt. Unsere Flotte von sechs Luxusschiffen (vier derzeit in der Pipeline) wird auf eine ganz andere und einzigartige Weise gebaut und entwickelt, die das Kreuzfahrterlebnis transformieren und neu definieren wird und eine eigene Kategorie schaffen wird, die an die nächste Generation von Luxusreisenden appelliert.

Diese Rolle spielt eine zentrale Rolle bei der Sicherung, Gestaltung und Aktivierung der Marke Explora Journeys auf allen Touchpoints, insbesondere bei Markenkampagnen, der Flotte und neuen Markenentwicklungen.

Basierend auf unserem Hauptsitz in Genf, diese Rolle sitzt an der Schnittstelle von Markenstrategie, Produktgeschichte und Ausführung, eng mit Product, Design, Hotel Operations, Commercial, PR, Media und Digital Teams zusammenarbeiten, um die Marke mit Klarheit, Konsistenz und emotionaler Tiefe auf den Märkten zu leben.

Ihre Auswirkungen

Brand Management & Governance

- Aktivieren Sie als Kernschützer der Marke Explora Journeys und unterstützen Sie den Brand Director im Tagesmanagement, Entwicklung und Evolution der Marke.

- Stellen Sie eine konsequente Anwendung von Markenidentität, Ton von Stimme, Messaging und visueller Sprache über alle Touchpoints, Kanäle und Gästereisen.

- Führen Sie die Entwicklung, Entwicklung und Wartung von Markenrichtlinien, Frameworks und Master-Toolkits, um Relevanz, Klarheit und Skalierbarkeit weltweit zu gewährleisten.

- Beitrag zu Markenstrategieinitiativen, Markenentwicklungsprojekten und internen Markenbildungen, zur Stärkung des Markenverständnisses und der Ausrichtung auf die gesamte Organisation.

Kampagnen, Content & Brand Activation

- Führen Sie die Entwicklung und Lieferung von Marken- und Produktkampagnen im Einklang mit Markenstrategie und kommerziellen Prioritäten.

- Übersehen Sie die Schaffung von Heldenmarke und Produktvermögen, einschließlich Schlüsselvisuellen, Kopierrahmen, Broschüren, Fotografie und Videografik.

- Arbeiten Sie eng mit Medien-, Digital- und PR-Teams zusammen, um einen kohärenten und hochwertigen Markenausdruck über bezahlte, im Besitz befindliche und verdiente Kanäle zu gewährleisten.

- Verwalten und kurieren Sie Marken-, Produkt- und Flotteninhalte innerhalb von DAM- und PIM-Systemen und gewährleisten Sie Genauigkeit, einfache Bedienung und globale Marktakzeptanz.

Produktmarketing – Fleet & Onboard Experience

- Eigene und artikuliere die Marke und Produkt-Erzählung für die Explora Journeys-Flotte, das Übersetzen von Schiffsdesign, an Bord Erfahrungen und Servicephilosophie in überzeugende, klare und gastzentrierte Geschichten.

- Act als wichtiger Markenpartner zu Product, New Builds und Hotel Operations Teams, unterstützt Projekte im gesamten Schiffslebenszyklus; von frühem Konzept über Lieferung, Start und In-Service Evolution.

- Definieren und aktivieren Sie die Schiffsebenenvorstellungen und -konzepte, Onboard-Erlebnisse, Suite-Konzepte, kulinarische, Wellness- und Einzelhandelssäulen und Servicerituale.

- Vergewissern Sie sich die Ausrichtung zwischen dem Gasterlebnis an Bord und der Marke, die dem Markt mitgeteilt wird.

Marktkoordination starten

- Unterstützung von Marken- und Produktbereitschaft für neue Markeninitiativen, Kampagnen, Schiffseinführungen, wichtige Meilensteine und Onboard-Innovationen.

- Entwickeln Sie Master-Start-Toolkits, um Kanäle, Märkte, Vertrieb und PR mit klaren Erzählungen, Positionierung und Assets auszustatten.

- Gewährleistung von Konsistenz, Klarheit und Markenausrichtung über alle internen und externen Kommunikationen im Zusammenhang mit Marke, Flotte und Produktentwicklung.

Cross Functional Collaboration & Operational Excellence

- Handeln Sie als vertrauenswürdiger Markenpartner über Funktionen hinweg und fördern die Ausrichtung zwischen Marke, Produkt, Handels- und operativen Teams

- Koordinierte Budgets, Lieferanten, Prognosen, Bestellungen und Rechnungen im Zusammenhang mit Markeninitiativen.

- Balance strategische Marke Denken mit Händen auf Ausführung in einer schnellen Tempo-Umgebung.

Ihre Reise so weit

- Master-Abschluss in Marketing, Brand Management, Product Marketing oder einem verwandten Bereich.

- 8+ Jahre Erfahrung im Markenmanagement und Kampagnenbau.

- Vorherige Erfahrung in Luxus-, Premium- oder High-End-Reise-, Gastfreundschaft oder Verbrauchermarken stark bevorzugt.

- Bewährte Erfahrung in einem globalen Hauptsitz-Umfeld, das Management von Marken-Frameworks und Master Assets auf den Märkten.

- Erleben Sie Management-Agenturen und externe kreative Partner.

Ihre Essenzen

- Exposition gegenüber Produktmarketing und physikalischen erfahrungsbasierten Produkten (Schiffe, Hotels, Resorts oder komplexe Premium-Umgebungen sehr wünschenswert).

- Starke kreative Sensibilität kombiniert mit operativer Härte, Detail- und Stakeholder-Managementfähigkeit.

- Bequeme Bewegung zwischen strategischem Markendenken und detaillierte Ausführung.

- fließend auf Englisch; zusätzliche europäische Sprachen sind ein starker Vorteil.

Bei Explora Journeys erneuern wir Luxus-Seereise – wo Entdeckung, Wohlbefinden und ein tiefer Respekt für die Meere in Harmonie zusammenkommen.
Wir suchen leidenschaftliche Fachleute, die unsere Vision einer immersiven, transformativen Art teilen, um die inspirierendsten Ziele der Welt auf dem Meer zu entdecken.
Sind Sie bereit, Ihre Leidenschaft in etwas Außergewöhnliches zu verwandeln? Begleiten Sie uns bei Explora Journeys, wo ein Ozean der Möglichkeiten erwartet. Hier beginnt Ihre Reise in den Ocean State of Mind.

jobs.description:
Where passion meets opportunity

Discover your journey into the extraordinary.

Your Purpose

Explora Journeys is a vibrant, cosmopolitan, European luxury brand, imagined in the heart of Swiss hospitality in Geneva. Leveraging our parent company MSC Group’s hundreds of years of maritime expertise, our fleet of six luxury ships (four currently in the pipeline) are being built and designed in a totally different and unique way that will transform and redefine the cruise experience, creating a category of its own, appealing to the next generation of luxury travellers.An exciting opportunity exists for a talented Digital Professional to join our newly created luxury travel brand Explora Journeys. This role is based in the office in Geneva.The Digital Platforms Manager will lead the strategy, development and deployment of our travel App.

Your Impact

The Digital platforms Manager will:

- Lead the strategy of the EJ guest Area including My Explora and our travel App

- Design and lead the development of the new App

- Define and maintain the Guest Area strategy and roadmap aligned with business goals.

- Establish governance frameworks, standards, and best practices for platform management.

- Identify opportunities for platforms innovation, optimization, and new capabilities.

- Document product features and create user stories

- Lead the creation and maintenance of platforms roadmap

- Translate complex technical requirements into actionable product specifications

- Communicate with cross-functional teams, including developers, designers, and business stakeholders

- Support the testing and release processes for new product updates

- Spot, report and follow the resolution & correction of bugs

- Monitor product performance metrics and making data-driven decisions

- Define KPIs and dashboards to track platform success.

Your Journey so far

- You have minimum of 8/10 years’ experience in a similar Role preferably in the Luxury or Luxury Hospitality/Travel Industry

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Digital Marketing, or related field.

- Experience managing web platforms, mobile apps, or enterprise digital ecosystems.

Your Essentials

Where passion meets opportunity

Discover your journey into the extraordinary.

Your Purpose

Explora Journeys is a vibrant, cosmopolitan, European luxury brand, imagined in the heart of Swiss hospitality in Geneva. Leveraging our parent company MSC Group’s hundreds of years of maritime expertise, our fleet of six luxury ships (four currently in the pipeline) are being built and designed in a totally different and unique way that will transform and redefine the cruise experience, creating a category of its own, appealing to the next generation of luxury travellers.An exciting opportunity exists for a talented Digital Professional to join our newly created luxury travel brand Explora Journeys. This role is based in the office in Geneva.The Digital Platforms Manager will lead the strategy, development and deployment of our travel App.

Your Impact

The Digital platforms Manager will:

- Lead the strategy of the EJ guest Area including My Explora and our travel App

- Design and lead the development of the new App

- Define and maintain the Guest Area strategy and roadmap aligned with business goals.

- Establish governance frameworks, standards, and best practices for platform management.

- Identify opportunities for platforms innovation, optimization, and new capabilities.

- Document product features and create user stories

- Lead the creation and maintenance of platforms roadmap

- Translate complex technical requirements into actionable product specifications

- Communicate with cross-functional teams, including developers, designers, and business stakeholders

- Support the testing and release processes for new product updates

- Spot, report and follow the resolution & correction of bugs

- Monitor product performance metrics and making data-driven decisions

- Define KPIs and dashboards to track platform success.

jobs.title: Senior HR Business Partner

descriptionByLocale.it: Are you experienced in strategic HR management? Join us as a Senior HR Business Partner, where you will provide hands-on HR support and drive performance in a dynamic hospitality environment. Collaborate with senior leaders to translate business priorities into effective people solutions and make a significant impact on organizational effectiveness.
descriptionByLocale.en: Your Purpose Working at the heart of the business and in close partnership with the Corporate HR team, the Senior HR Business Partner provides strategic and hands-on HR support to assigned corporate functions and offices worldwide, within a fast-paced, service-driven hospitality environment. Reporting to the Head of HR, this role partners with senior leaders to translate business priorities into effective people solutions, while ensuring consistent application of Group HR policies, processes, and standards. The Senior HRBP plays a key role in driving performance, engagement, and organisational effectiveness in a complex, international organisation where operational excellence, agility, and customer focus are critical. Your Impact - Act as the primary HR partner for assigned corporate functions, providing strategic advice and operational HR support aligned with business objectives; - Equip leaders with the tools, frameworks, and guidance required to effectively manage their teams in line with Group values and people policies; - Partner with senior leaders to support workforce planning and organisational needs, ensuring capabilities and capacity are aligned with current and future business requirements; - Collaborate closely with Talent Acquisition and hiring managers to define recruitment needs and support delivery of hiring plans in line with agreed KPIs; - Drive performance and accountability by supporting the implementation of the Group performance management framework, including goal setting, evaluation cycles, and manager capability building; - Support talent management processes within the business perimeter, including talent reviews, identification of high-potential employees, succession discussions, and development actions, in coordination with the Head of HR and relevant Centers of Expertise; - Advise managers on employee relations matters, ensuring fair, consistent, and compliant people decisions; - Support change management and organisational initiatives by assessing people impact, supporting leaders through transitions, and ensuring clear and effective communication; - Contribute to key HR cycles such as annual compensation reviews, talent reviews, and employee engagement initiatives; - Work closely with HR Operations, Payroll, and HRIS teams to ensure smooth execution of HR processes and digital tools; - Participate in global HR projects and initiatives, contributing business insight and supporting effective local implementation; - Conduct exit interviews, analyse turnover trends, and contribute to retention and engagement actions within the business perimeter. Your Journey so far - Master’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field; - Minimum 10 years of progressive HR experience in a matrixed, multinational environment, including at least 5 -7 years in a Senior HR Business Partner or equivalent role; - Proven HR experience within the hospitality, cruise, travel or customer-centric industry, with a strong understanding of service culture; - Demonstrated experience partnering with senior leaders in a corporate or headquarters environment; - Strong project management skills, with the ability to plan, coordinate, and deliver HR initiatives involving multiple stakeholders and tight timelines; - Solid exposure to performance management, talent processes, employee relations, and organisational support; - Experience working with global HR policies, frameworks, and HR systems (HRIS); - Knowledge of Swiss Labour Law is an advantage; - Fluent in English; French is an advantage. Your Essentials - Strong business acumen with the ability to translate strategy into pragmatic HR solutions; - Credible and confident advisor, able to influence, challenge, and build trust with senior stakeholders; - Strong understanding of hospitality and service excellence cultures, with the ability to balance people care, performance, and operational demands; - Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands-on delivery in a fast-paced, high-expectation environment. - Structured, reliable, and comfortable operating across multiple priorities; - Collaborative mindset, with the ability to work effectively across HR functions and with diverse stakeholders; - High standards of integrity, discretion, and professional judgment; - Flexible, resilient, and solution-oriented, with a continuous improvement mindset. Our commitment We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet. Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

jobs.title: Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager

titleByLocale.en: Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager
titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing e CRO
titleByLocale.de: Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager
titleByLocale.fr: Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager

jobs.description:
Your Purpose

The Digital Analytics Strategy, Testing and CRO Manager will be responsible for driving D2C growth through data-driven experimentation and strategic optimization of our direct digital channels. You will spearhead our testing and insights strategy to maximize conversion rates, booking volumes and revenue per visitor, while building a best-in-class experimentation practice that delivers sustainable competitive advantage. This role will have a strong strategic focus on the direct channel, optimizing lead generation, and leveraging insights to drive higher customer acquisition, engagement, and lifetime value.

Your Impact

• Design and execute a comprehensive data driven strategy across all digital touchpoints, with particular focus on driving direct channel growth and reducing acquisition costs through improved conversion rates.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, engineering, marketing, and web analytics to conceptualize and design A/B tests that effectively measure the impact of website and campaign changes.

• Drive strategic initiatives within the direct channel, ensuring a data-driven approach to lead generation, audience segmentation, and customer journey optimization to improve conversion and engagement.

• Develop deep customer journey insights through advanced analytics, identifying key friction points and opportunities to enhance the user experience and drive higher booking values.

• Perform advanced digital segmentation analyses to uncover high-value customer segments and personalization opportunities across the conversion funnel.

• Establish robust measurement frameworks to quantify the commercial impact of optimization initiatives, including test design, revenue forecasting, and post-implementation analysis.

• Develop comprehensive performance dashboards that combine testing results, customer behavior metrics, and commercial KPIs to guide conversion rate optimization.

• Drive innovation in personalization and optimization strategies to maximize direct channel contribution using the newly adopted tools (Adobe Analytics, Adobe Target, Real-time CDP).

• Develop testing frameworks that balance quick wins with longer-term strategic initiatives.

Your Journey so far

• Degree in business, marketing, analytics, or a related field, with 5 years of relevant experience.

• Proven track record of leveraging D2C data insights to shape marketing and product strategies, particularly in booking funnel optimization.

• Hands-on experience with A/B testing tools like Adobe Target.

Your Essentials

• Expertise in web analytics platforms such as Google Analytics, Adobe Analytics and AEP.

• Strong analytical mindset with the ability to distill complex data into actionable business strategies.

• Excellent communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams and influence decision-making.

• Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, evolving environment, managing multiple initiatives simultaneously.

• EU Passport or right to work in Switzerland.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

jobs.title: Casino Slots and Technical Operations Manager

titleByLocale.en: Casino Slots and Technical Operations Manager
titleByLocale.it: Responsabile delle Slot e delle Operazioni Tecniche del Casinò
titleByLocale.de: Casino Slots and Technical Operations Manager
titleByLocale.fr: Casino Slots and Technical Operations Manager

jobs.description:
Your Purpose

Lead Onboard Casino Technical teams, ensuring smooth operations, maintaining high standards of service, and maximising revenue generation. As a Casino Slot and Technical Operations Manager, you will be responsible for monitoring slot machine performance, analysing gaming data, and implementing strategies to enhance player satisfaction and profitability. Your role will involve regular inspections and maintenance scheduling to ensure all slot machines are functioning correctly and efficiently. You will also be responsible for managing inventory, ordering new equipment, and coordinating installations and upgrades. You will be expected to stay updated on industry trends and emerging technologies, proactively adapting operations to maintain compliance and competitive advantage.

Your Impact

• Oversee all technical projects and actively participate in their implementation. Maintain an excellent line of communication with the shore and ship technical department to ensure all casino projects are deployed according to schedule and comply to the company’s technical and safety standards.
• Assist with budgeting, forecasting and revenue analysis.
• Manage budgets, control costs, and optimise resource allocation.
• Support and guide onboard Casino management team on each vessel through constant communication and regular ship operational visits. Discuss any areas of concern specific to the Operation and brand specific product, and similarly address points of commendation.
• Provide accurate and objective assessment of onboard Casino operations and personnel.
• Revenue analysis, identifying trends with the ability to create structured solutions to increase or enhance revenue streams. Explore new ways of increasing existing revenue and /or improving current working practices, whilst at the same time maintaining a high technical and security standard onboard our ships.
• Isolate areas falling below standard with members of the Casino Shipboard management team.
• Training of all management teams in Slot Revenue, Security and Surveillance.
• Confirm that security measures meet minimum requirements.
• Provide troubleshooting support and advice via email to shipboard technical teams.
• Assess, evaluate and review data for organizing projects and/or providing directions on activities, tasks or processes in accordance with company guidelines.

Your Journey so far

• Minimum 5 years of experience in casino slot operations management.
• Previous experience working on a cruise ship is mandatory.

Your Essentials

• Strong knowledge of gaming regulations and compliance requirements.
• Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
• Proficiency in analysing gaming data and financial reports.
• Ability to manage budgets, control costs, and optimize resources.

Our commitment

descriptionByLocale.en:
Your Purpose

Lead Onboard Casino Technical teams, ensuring smooth operations, maintaining high standards of service, and maximising revenue generation. As a Casino Slot and Technical Operations Manager, you will be responsible for monitoring slot machine performance, analysing gaming data, and implementing strategies to enhance player satisfaction and profitability. Your role will involve regular inspections and maintenance scheduling to ensure all slot machines are functioning correctly and efficiently. You will also be responsible for managing inventory, ordering new equipment, and coordinating installations and upgrades. You will be expected to stay updated on industry trends and emerging technologies, proactively adapting operations to maintain compliance and competitive advantage.

Your Impact

• Oversee all technical projects and actively participate in their implementation. Maintain an excellent line of communication with the shore and ship technical department to ensure all casino projects are deployed according to schedule and comply to the company’s technical and safety standards.
• Assist with budgeting, forecasting and revenue analysis.
• Manage budgets, control costs, and optimise resource allocation.
• Support and guide onboard Casino management team on each vessel through constant communication and regular ship operational visits. Discuss any areas of concern specific to the Operation and brand specific product, and similarly address points of commendation.
• Provide accurate and objective assessment of onboard Casino operations and personnel.
• Revenue analysis, identifying trends with the ability to create structured solutions to increase or enhance revenue streams. Explore new ways of increasing existing revenue and /or improving current working practices, whilst at the same time maintaining a high technical and security standard onboard our ships.
• Isolate areas falling below standard with members of the Casino Shipboard management team.
• Training of all management teams in Slot Revenue, Security and Surveillance.
• Confirm that security measures meet minimum requirements.
• Provide troubleshooting support and advice via email to shipboard technical teams.
• Assess, evaluate and review data for organizing projects and/or providing directions on activities, tasks or processes in accordance with company guidelines.

Your Journey so far

• Minimum 5 years of experience in casino slot operations management.
• Previous experience working on a cruise ship is mandatory.

Your Essentials

• Strong knowledge of gaming regulations and compliance requirements.
• Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
• Proficiency in analysing gaming data and financial reports.
• Ability to manage budgets, control costs, and optimize resources.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

jobs.title: Experience Development & Delivery Manager - New Builds

titleByLocale.en: Experience Development & Delivery Manager - New Builds
titleByLocale.it: Experience Development & Delivery Manager - Nuove Costruzioni
titleByLocale.fr: Experience Development & Delivery Manager - Nouvelles constructions

jobs.description:
Your Purpose

Do you excel at turning complexity into clarity? Are you energized by shaping ideas, challenging assumptions, and amplifying a leader’s impact?
We are seeking a New Builds Development & Delivery Manager who will act as an extension of the Senior Manager of Concept Innovation, enhancing strategic thinking, improving decision‑making speed, and helping bring robust, high-quality concepts to senior leadership.
This role is not operational and not a presentation-updating position. It is a partnership role, designed for someone who can think critically, structure ambiguous problems, challenge insights, and support the development of transformational guest experience concepts.You will collaborate closely with stakeholders across Experience, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild, and Strategy, ensuring concepts are analytically sound, insight-driven, and aligned with the company expectations. You’ll gain exposure to strategic discussions, influence senior decision-making, and drive clarity across innovation workstreams.
If you are a sharp thinker, a natural challenger, and a trusted partner able to elevate the work of others, this is the role for you

Your Impact

Strategic Support & Thought Partnership

- Act as a direct strategic partner to the Senior Manager, helping structure thinking, frame problems, and sharpen concept narratives.

- Participate in or lead selected meetings on behalf of Guest Experience Innovation

- Prepare strategic briefs, decision frameworks, and synthesis documents for SVP-level conversations.

Narrative Building & Executive-Ready Communication

- Craft clear, concise, and strategically sound storytelling materials for leadership forums

- Transform complex information into high-impact narratives.

- Support leadership in preparing for SVP/EVP/Executive Committee discussions.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Engage with Experience, Entertainment, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild, Strategy, and Operations teams to gather insights and shape concepts.

- Lead the development and delivery of new entertainment concepts, experiences, and spaces across our fleet.

- Act as the key link between creative partners, operations, and corporate functions, ensuring alignment and buy-in at every stage.

Project & Stakeholder Management

- Drive clarity in workstreams by structuring timelines, identifying decision points, and anticipating risks.

- Follow up with stakeholders to ensure progress and alignment.

- Elevate issues early and propose mitigation scenarios.

Your Journey so far

- 5–8 years in strategy, innovation, business design, consulting, or strategic project management.

- Experience in hospitality, cruise, retail, consumer goods, or guest experience is a strong plus.

- Strong background in designing and executing guest-focused experiences, from concept to delivery.

- A balance of creativity and operational know-how, able to dream big and deliver practically.

- Proven track record in managing complex, cross-functional teams (operations, creative, marketing, sales, revenue, communications), with the ability to unite diverse perspectives around a single vision.

- Excellent knowledge of modern visual communication tools (Canva, Adobe Suite, AI-driven creative platforms) to produce compelling visual documents and storytelling assets beyond traditional slide decks.

- Excellent relationship-building skills; able to inspire, influence, and connect across diverse teams.

- Strong storytelling and presentation skills, with confidence at the executive level.

- Ability to travel 20-30% of the time.

- Fluent English; additional languages a plus.

Your Essentials

- Excellent knowledge of modern visual communication tools (Canva, Adobe Suite, AI-driven creative platforms) to produce compelling visual documents and storytelling assets beyond traditional slide decks.

- Excellent relationship-building skills; able to inspire, influence, and connect across diverse teams.

- Strong storytelling and presentation skills, with confidence at the executive level.

- Proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook.

- Ability to travel 20-30% of the time.

- Fluent English; additional languages a plus

- EU Passport or right to work in Switzerland.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

descriptionByLocale.it:
Il tuo scopo

eccelle nel trasformare la complessità in chiarezza? Sei eccitato plasmando idee, presupposti stimolanti e amplificando l’impatto di un leader?
Stiamo cercando un New Builds Development & Delivery Manager che agirà come estensione del Senior Manager of Concept Innovation, migliorando il pensiero strategico, migliorando la velocità decisionale e aiutando a portare concetti robusti e di alta qualità alla leadership senior.
Questo ruolo non è operativo e non è una posizione di presentazione. Si tratta di un ruolo di partnership, progettato per qualcuno che può pensare criticamente, strutturare problemi ambigui, sfidare intuizioni e sostenere lo sviluppo di concetti di esperienza degli ospiti trasformazionali. Collaborerai a stretto contatto con le parti interessate attraverso Experience, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild e Strategy, assicurando che i concetti siano analiticamente sani, orientati agli insight e allineati alle aspettative dell'azienda. Potrai ottenere l'esposizione a discussioni strategiche, influenzare il processo decisionale senior, e guidare la chiarezza attraverso i flussi di lavoro di innovazione.
Se sei un pensatore acuto, un sfidante naturale, e un partner affidabile in grado di elevare il lavoro degli altri, questo è il ruolo per voi

Il tuo impatto

Supporto strategico e partenariato di pensiero

- Agire come partner strategico diretto al Senior Manager, aiutando il pensiero della struttura, i problemi della struttura e affinare le narrazioni dei concetti.

- Partecipare o condurre riunioni selezionate per conto dell'Innovazione dell'esperienza ospite

- Preparare brevi strategici, quadri decisionali e documenti di sintesi per conversazioni a livello SVP.

Narrative Building & Executive-Ready Comunicazione

- Materiali di storytelling chiari, concisi e strategicamente sani per forum di leadership

- Trasformare informazioni complesse in narrazioni ad alto impatto.

- Sostenere la leadership nella preparazione delle discussioni del Comitato SVP/EVP/Executive.

Collaborazione trasversale

- Coinvolgere con i team Experience, Entertainment, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild, Strategy e Operations per raccogliere idee e concetti di forma.

- Condurre lo sviluppo e la consegna di nuovi concetti di intrattenimento, esperienze e spazi attraverso la nostra flotta.

- Agire come il collegamento chiave tra partner creativi, operazioni e funzioni aziendali, garantendo allineamento e buy-in in ogni fase.

Project & Stakeholder Management

- Guidare la chiarezza nei flussi di lavoro strutturando le linee temporali, identificare i punti di decisione e anticipare i rischi.

- Seguire con gli stakeholder per garantire il progresso e l'allineamento.

- Elevare i problemi presto e proporre scenari di mitigazione.

Il tuo viaggio finora

- 5-8 anni di strategia, innovazione, business design, consulenza o gestione strategica del progetto.

- L'esperienza in ospitalità, crociera, vendita al dettaglio, beni di consumo, o l'esperienza degli ospiti è un vantaggio forte.

- Forte sfondo nella progettazione e nell'esecuzione di esperienze orientate agli ospiti, dal concetto alla consegna.

- Un equilibrio di creatività e know-how operativo, in grado di sognare grande e consegnare praticamente.

- Provato track record nella gestione di team complessi e interfunzionali (operazioni, creativo, marketing, vendite, ricavi, comunicazioni), con la capacità di unire prospettive diverse intorno a una singola visione.

- Ottima conoscenza dei moderni strumenti di comunicazione visiva (Canva, Adobe Suite, piattaforme creative basate su AI) per produrre documenti visivi e attività di storytelling oltre i tradizionali ponti di scorrimento.

- Eccellente capacità di costruzione di relazioni; in grado di ispirare, influenzare e connettersi tra diverse squadre.

- Forte capacità di narrazione e presentazione, con fiducia a livello esecutivo.

- Capacità di viaggiare 20-30% del tempo.

- Inglese fluente; lingue aggiuntive a plus.

I tuoi essenziali

- Ottima conoscenza dei moderni strumenti di comunicazione visiva (Canva, Adobe Suite, piattaforme creative basate su AI) per produrre documenti visivi e attività di storytelling oltre i tradizionali ponti di scorrimento.

- Eccellente capacità di costruzione di relazioni; in grado di ispirare, influenzare e connettersi tra diverse squadre.

- Forte capacità di narrazione e presentazione, con fiducia a livello esecutivo.

- Proficienza in Excel, PowerPoint e Outlook.

- Capacità di viaggiare 20-30% del tempo.

- Inglese fluente; lingue aggiuntive a plus

- EU Passport o diritto di lavoro in Svizzera.

Il nostro impegno

Ci impegniamo a costruire un futuro che valorizza diverse prospettive, abbraccia il mondo oltre i confini, e promuove un ambiente inclusivo in cui ogni individuo si sente valorizzato, rispettato e potenziato per essere il proprio sé autentico. Il nostro impegno si estende a intraprendere azioni significative e misurabili che hanno un impatto positivo a lungo termine sui nostri ospiti, sui nostri dipendenti e sul nostro pianeta.

Pronto a trasformare la tua passione in qualcosa di straordinario? Unisciti a noi a MSC Crociere, dove attendono nuove opportunità. Applicare oggi per essere parte di un team globale che sta spingendo i confini e raggiungere qualcosa di notevole. Il tuo viaggio inizia qui!
descriptionByLocale.de:
Ihr Ziel

Sie zeichnen sich dadurch aus, Komplexität in Klarheit zu verwandeln? Werden Sie durch die Gestaltung von Ideen, anspruchsvollen Annahmen und die Verstärkung der Auswirkungen eines Führers angeregt?
Wir suchen einen New Builds Development & Delivery Manager, der als Erweiterung des Senior Managers of Concept Innovation fungiert, strategisches Denken verbessert, die Entscheidungsgeschwindigkeit verbessert und dazu beiträgt, robuste, qualitativ hochwertige Konzepte an Senior Leader zu bringen.
Diese Rolle ist nicht funktionsfähig und nicht eine Präsentations-updating Position. Es ist eine Partnerschaftsrolle, die für jemanden entwickelt wird, der kritisch denken kann, mehrdeutige Probleme strukturieren, Erkenntnisse herausfordern und die Entwicklung von transformierenden Gasterlebnis-Konzepten unterstützen kann. Sie werden eng mit den Stakeholdern in den Bereichen Experience, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild und Strategie zusammenarbeiten, um zu gewährleisten, dass Konzepte analytisch fundiert, einsichtsorientiert und mit den Erwartungen des Unternehmens übereinstimmen. Sie werden sich mit strategischen Diskussionen auseinandersetzen, ältere Entscheidungsfindungen beeinflussen und Klarheit über Innovationsarbeitsbereiche schaffen.
Wenn Sie ein scharfer Denker, ein natürlicher Herausforderer und ein vertrauenswürdiger Partner sind, der die Arbeit anderer erhöhen kann, ist dies die Rolle für Sie

Ihre Auswirkungen

Strategische Unterstützung und Gedankenpartnerschaft

- Aktivieren Sie als direkter strategischer Partner für den Senior Manager, helfen Sie Strukturdenken, Rahmenprobleme und schärfen Konzept-Erzählungen.

- Erwarten Sie ausgewählte Treffen im Auftrag von Guest Experience Innovation

- Bereiten Sie strategische Briefe, Entscheidungsrahmen und Synthesedokumente für SVP-Level-Konversationen vor.

Narrative Gebäude & Executive-Ready Kommunikation

- Handwerk klare, prägnant und strategisch fundierte Geschichten für Führungsforen

- Transformieren Sie komplexe Informationen in hochwirksame Erzählungen.

- Unterstützung bei der Vorbereitung auf SVP/EVP/Executive Committee Diskussionen.

Cross-Functionale Zusammenarbeit

- Mit den Teams Experience, Entertainment, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild, Strategy und Operations, Erkenntnisse und Formen von Konzepten zu sammeln.

- Führen Sie die Entwicklung und Lieferung neuer Unterhaltungskonzepte, Erfahrungen und Räume über unsere Flotte hinweg.

- Aktivieren Sie als zentrale Verbindung zwischen kreativen Partnern, Betrieben und Unternehmensfunktionen, um die Ausrichtung und das Buy-in auf jeder Stufe zu gewährleisten.

Projekt & Stakeholder Management

- Führen Sie die Klarheit in den Arbeitsabläufen durch die Strukturierung von Zeitlinien, die Identifizierung von Entscheidungspunkten und die Vermeidung von Risiken.

- Folgen Sie den Akteuren, um Fortschritte und Ausrichtung zu gewährleisten.

- Erhöhen Sie Probleme frühzeitig und schlagen Sie Abschwächungsszenarien vor.

Ihre Reise so weit

- 5–8 Jahre Strategie, Innovation, Business Design, Beratung oder strategisches Projektmanagement.

- Erfahrung in Gastfreundschaft, Kreuzfahrt, Einzelhandel, Konsumgüter oder Gasterlebnis ist ein starkes Plus.

- Starker Hintergrund bei der Gestaltung und Durchführung von Gast-fokussierten Erfahrungen, vom Konzept bis zur Lieferung.

- Eine Balance von Kreativität und operativem Know-how, in der Lage zu träumen und praktisch zu liefern.

- Erprobter Rekord bei der Verwaltung komplexer, funktionsübergreifender Teams (Betriebe, Kreative, Marketing, Vertrieb, Umsatz, Kommunikation), mit der Fähigkeit, verschiedene Perspektiven um eine einzige Vision zu vereinen.

- Ausgezeichnetes Wissen über moderne visuelle Kommunikationstools (Canva, Adobe Suite, KI-getriebene kreative Plattformen), um überzeugende visuelle Dokumente und Storytelling-Assets jenseits traditioneller Diadecks herzustellen.

- Ausgezeichnete Beziehungsbildung Fähigkeiten; in der Lage zu inspirieren, beeinflussen und verbinden über verschiedene Teams.

- Starke Storytelling- und Präsentationsfähigkeiten, mit Vertrauen auf Executive-Ebene.

- Fähigkeit, 20-30% der Zeit zu reisen.

- Fluent English; weitere Sprachen a plus.

Ihre Essenzen

- Ausgezeichnetes Wissen über moderne visuelle Kommunikationstools (Canva, Adobe Suite, KI-getriebene kreative Plattformen), um überzeugende visuelle Dokumente und Storytelling-Assets jenseits traditioneller Diadecks herzustellen.

- Ausgezeichnete Beziehungsbildung Fähigkeiten; in der Lage zu inspirieren, beeinflussen und verbinden über verschiedene Teams.

- Starke Storytelling- und Präsentationsfähigkeiten, mit Vertrauen auf Executive-Ebene.

- Effizienz in Excel, PowerPoint und Outlook.

- Fähigkeit, 20-30% der Zeit zu reisen.

- Fluent English; weitere Sprachen a plus

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Votre but

Vous excellez à transformer la complexité en clarté ? Êtes-vous énergisé en formant des idées, en contestant des hypothèses et en amplifiant l'impact d'un leader?
Nous sommes à la recherche d'un nouveau gestionnaire du développement et de la prestation des nouvelles constructions qui agira à titre d'extension du gestionnaire principal de l'innovation conceptuelle, améliorera la pensée stratégique, améliorera la rapidité de prise de décisions et aidera à apporter des concepts robustes et de haute qualité aux cadres supérieurs.
Ce rôle n'est pas opérationnel ni un poste de mise à jour de présentation. Il s'agit d'un rôle de partenariat, conçu pour quelqu'un qui peut penser critiquement, structurer des problèmes ambigus, remettre en question les idées, et soutenir le développement de concepts d'expérience d'invité transformationnelle. Vous collaborerez étroitement avec les intervenants de Experience, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild et Strategy, en veillant à ce que les concepts soient solides sur le plan analytique, axés sur les idées et conformes aux attentes de l'entreprise. Vous serez exposé à des discussions stratégiques, influencerez la prise de décisions et favoriserez la clarté dans tous les secteurs de l'innovation.
Si vous êtes un bon penseur, un challenger naturel, et un partenaire de confiance capable d'élever le travail des autres, c'est le rôle pour vous

Votre impact

Partenariat stratégique de soutien et de réflexion

- Agir en tant que partenaire stratégique direct du gestionnaire principal, aider à structurer la réflexion, à encadrer les problèmes et à affiner les narrations conceptuelles.

- Participer ou diriger des réunions sélectionnées au nom de Guest Experience Innovation

- Préparer des mémoires stratégiques, des cadres de décision et des documents de synthèse pour les conversations au niveau du SVP.

Narrative Building & Executive-Ready Communication

- Craft des matériaux de narration clairs, concis et stratégiques pour les forums de leadership

- Transformer l'information complexe en récits à fort impact.

- Appuyer le leadership dans la préparation des discussions du SVP/EVP/Comité exécutif.

Collaboration interfonctionnelle

- S'engager avec des équipes d'expérience, de divertissement, de vente au détail, de marketing, de Newbuild, de stratégie et d'opérations pour recueillir des idées et façonner des concepts.

- Diriger le développement et la diffusion de nouveaux concepts, expériences et espaces de divertissement dans notre flotte.

- Être le lien clé entre les partenaires créatifs, les opérations et les fonctions de l'entreprise, en assurant l'alignement et l'adhésion à chaque étape.

Gestion des projets et des intervenants

- Conduire la clarté dans les secteurs de travail en structurant les délais, en identifiant les points de décision et en anticipant les risques.

- Assurer le suivi avec les parties prenantes pour assurer les progrès et l'alignement.

- Élever rapidement les problèmes et proposer des scénarios d ' atténuation.

Votre voyage jusqu'à présent

- 5-8 ans en stratégie, innovation, conception d'entreprise, consultation ou gestion de projet stratégique.

- L'expérience de l'hospitalité, croisière, de la vente au détail, des biens de consommation ou de l'expérience des clients est un plus fort.

- Forte expérience dans la conception et l'exécution d'expériences axées sur les clients, du concept à la livraison.

- Un équilibre entre créativité et savoir-faire opérationnel, capable de rêver grand et de livrer pratiquement.

- Expérience éprouvée dans la gestion d'équipes complexes et interfonctionnelles (opérations, création, marketing, ventes, revenus, communications), avec la capacité d'unir diverses perspectives autour d'une vision unique.

- Excellente connaissance des outils de communication visuelle modernes (Canva, Adobe Suite, plates-formes créatives pilotées par l'IA) pour produire des documents visuels convaincants et des narrations au-delà des plates-formes traditionnelles.
